families.name: Forage / Gathering
risk_text_options: Pack losses are possible on rough paths.
note_text_options: Low-cost gather route using known local grounds.
Reliable provisioning pass through nearby resource pockets.

families.name: Procurement / Trade
risk_text_options: Market scarcity may trim final stock.
Caravan delays can push delivery windows.
note_text_options: Uses guild coin to secure known stock quickly.
Targets trusted local vendors for stable supply lots.

families.name: Salvage / Recovery
risk_text_options: Recovered goods may include damaged crates.
Route hazards can force partial retrieval.
note_text_options: Recovers abandoned stock from known routes.
Trades speed for potential extra salvage volume.
